query:
INSERT INTO sales (id, companyId, propertyId, buyerName, saleDate, saleValue, status, createdAt) 
SELECT 
  CONCAT('sale_fev_', LPAD(@rownum := @rownum + 1, 2, '0')),
  'company_1766331506068',
  'prop_1',
  CONCAT('Comprador ', @rownum),
  DATE_ADD('2026-02-01', INTERVAL FLOOR(RAND() * 28) DAY),
  FLOOR(RAND() * 500000) + 100000,
  'commission_paid',
  NOW()
FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14) t, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r;
